# Appendices


## Appendix A: Useful Notation

| Symbol | Meaning |
|:--|:--|
| $x_i$ | the $i$th observation or feature value |
| $X$ | data matrix |
| $y$ | response vector |
| $\beta$ | parameter vector |
| $E[X]$ | expectation |
| $\operatorname{Var}(X)$ | variance |
| $\nabla f$ | gradient of $f$ |

## Appendix B: Matrix Identities

For conformable matrices,

- $(AB)^T = B^T A^T$,
- $(A^T)^T = A$,
- $A(I)=A$,
- if $A$ is invertible, then $AA^{-1}=I$.

## Appendix C: R Setup

```{r eval=FALSE}
install.packages(c("bookdown", "knitr", "rmarkdown"))
bookdown::render_book("index.Rmd")
```

## Appendix D: Suggestions for Instructors

A one-semester course may cover Chapters 1--8 and selected parts of Chapters
10--12. A two-semester sequence can cover the entire book with projects.
